title: Versonify Versioning Rules
description: Schema for the Versonify versioning rules configuration file, defining digit behaviours and display types.

units.description: The collection of version digit units, each defining how one part of the version number behaves.

displayTypes.description: Controls the display format for each version digit. Must have the same number of entries as 'units'.

versionUnit.description: Represents a single digit within the version number.

IncrementOverride.description: An optional override value applied during the next increment, then cleared. Set to null when no override is active.

Value.description: The current value of this version digit. Can be numeric or a release name string.

PreFix.description: The separator prefix prepended to this digit when the version string is rendered (e.g. '.', '-', or empty string for the first digit).

digitIncrementBehaviour.description: Controls how this digit is incremented. Maps to the DigitIncrementBehaviour enum.

oneOf.title: Fixed
oneOf.description: The digit does not change during an increment.

oneOf.title: DaysSinceDate
oneOf.description: Reflects the number of days elapsed since the configured base date.

oneOf.title: DailyAutoIncrement
oneOf.description: Increments each build within the current day, resetting to zero the next day.

oneOf.title: AutoIncrementWithReset
oneOf.description: Increments continually, resetting to zero when the next higher digit changes.

oneOf.title: AutoIncrementWithResetAny
oneOf.description: Increments continually, resetting to zero when any higher-order digit changes.

oneOf.title: ContinualIncrement
oneOf.description: Increments without stopping; resets to zero on overflow.

oneOf.title: WeeksSinceDate
oneOf.description: Reflects the number of whole or partial weeks since the configured base date.

oneOf.title: ReleaseName
oneOf.description: Set to the literal release name string rather than a numeric value.

displayType.description: Controls how a digit is rendered in the version string. Maps to the DisplayType enum.

oneOf.title: NoDisplay
oneOf.description: The digit is not included in the rendered version string.

oneOf.title: FourDigitNumeric
oneOf.description: Four-digit numeric format, recommended for FileVersion and AssemblyVersion.
